examples: She also has a few $1,000 honoraria to offer in exchange for doctors' attendance at her company's next educational lecture.
Doctors in the panel discussion at the conference disclosed that they receive honoraria, research money and consulting fees from the drug maker.
However, he requires them to donate all honoraria or consulting fees directly to charity so that he receives neither income nor a tax deduction.
Peto writes that he and his colleagues at CTSU take no honoraria, consultancy fees or other payments, although companies occasionally pay for their travel accommodations.
